meaning: adj.无法计量的,不可测的,无限的
examples: We also analyzed the causes which result in unmeasurable phenomena.
We define the absolute unmeasurable areaand present the criterion of it.
Actually the symmetry in physics means unmeasurable for certain fundamental quantities.
We should be measuring the quantitative, transactional part of our business, but we should also recognize the unmeasurable value of the qualitative, relationship-based element.
In addition to the lives lost, we inflict tremendous trauma on children who witness these attacks, and unmeasurable psychological damage on parents who never know if this day will be their last.
